title: 以下、Kernel/FUGUEに活用できる？ Server: SimpleHTTP/0.6 Python/3.11.9
summary_text: `BLOCKED` Requested action: `openai/skills` の採用可否を、この Codex セッション内の local Kernel consensus で最終 adjudication すること。 Active lanes: - `Codex/main`: routing / synthesis / stop-condition enforcement - `Pauli [phase:critique] [family:quorum] [provider_hint:codex]`: completed - `Dirac [phase:simulate] [family:bridge-evidence] [provider_hint:codex]`: completed - `Aquinas [phase:replan] [family:execution-contract] [provider_hint:codex]`: completed - `GLM/session 47770 [phase:simulate] [family:quorum] [provider_hint:glm]`: completed - `GLM/session 20047 [phase:critique] [family:bridge-evidence] [provider_hint:glm]`: completed - `GLM/session 79651 [phase:replan] [family:execution-contract] [provider_hint:glm]`: completed Missing lanes: - `Claude adjudication lane` - `Second non-Codex diversity lane` for fallback quorum Attempted bridge-authoritative probe: - Configured external router module resolved to [integration.js](/Users/masayuki/Cursorvers_Platform/orchestration/router/integration.js) - Explicit Claude-targeted probe through `productionRoute()` returned `model:"sonnet"` with `delegationScript:null` - Same explicit probe repeated 3 times in this run returned the same result: - `attempt 1`: `sonnet`, `delegationScript:null` - `attempt 2`: `sonnet`, `delegationScript:null` - `attempt 3`: `sonnet`, `delegationScript:null` - `getDelegationScript({model:'sonnet'})` returned `{"script":null,"defaultAgent":null}` - `EXISTING_DELEGATION` advertises only `delegate.js`, `delegate-glm.js`, `delegate-gemini.js`; no Claude executor is advertised Concrete failure reason: - The bridge can route to `sonnet`, but this session has no executable Claude handoff for that route - No live Claude response was produced in this run - Replacement probes in this run also failed: - `Gemini`: `fetch failed` - `Copilot`: `timeout_seconds: 15` Result: - `Codex + GLM` evidence is present - `Claude` is not proven active, and fallback quorum was not recovered - Continuing to final recommendation would violate the local Kernel quorum rule Working judgment remains unchanged but non-final: `openai/skills` is usable as a `lane capability package`, not as the `Kernel/FUGUE orchestration layer`, with controls like `repo pin`, `explicit invocation` for high-risk lanes, capability sandboxing, audit ledger, parity/replay tests, and rollback readiness.
